# bear.css

> Zero-dependency, zero-build atomic CSS utility framework built on a
> five-level token hierarchy (Raw → Primitives → Tokens → Properties →
> Compositions). No purge step. No build tool required for consumers.
> ~6.7KB gzipped. Native CSS cascade layers, logical properties, fluid
> type/space via clamp(), container queries.

## Quick start (consumer — no build step)

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="path/to/dist/bear.css">
```

That's it. Use utility classes directly in HTML. To customize, override CSS
custom properties in your own stylesheet — never edit dist/bear.css:

```css
:root {
  --color-accent: #8b5cf6;
  --radius-sm: 0.5rem;
}
```

## The atomic stack — the rule an agent must follow

Each level ONLY ever references the level directly below it. Never skip a
level, never hardcode a raw value into a utility class.

- Level 0 — RAW VALUES: pure unitless numbers, meaningless alone (e.g. `4`)
- Level 1 — PRIMITIVES (`src/primitives/`): raw values given units, no
  semantics. Never referenced directly in HTML. E.g. `--primitive-1: 0.25rem`
- Level 2 — TOKENS (`src/tokens/tokens.css`): primitives given semantic
  names. The override point. E.g. `--space-xs: var(--primitive-1)`
- Level 3 — PROPERTIES (`src/properties/`): tokens applied to a CSS
  property as a utility class. E.g. `.m-xs { margin: var(--space-xs); }`
- Level 4 — COMPOSITIONS (`src/composition/`): properties combined into a
  named layout pattern. E.g. `.stack { display:flex; flex-direction:column;
  gap: var(--space-md); }`

Rule for agents writing or extending bear.css: properties reference tokens
only, never primitives. Compositions combine properties/tokens, never
hardcode a raw value. If a needed value doesn't exist as a token, add the
token — don't hardcode around it.

## Repo structure

```
bear.config.js               ← single source of truth for the generated scale
src/
  bear.css                   ← entry point, @imports only, declares layer order
  reset.css                  ← sane baseline defaults
  build.js                   ← zero-dependency compiler (node src/build.js)
  primitives/
    scale.css                ← AUTO-GENERATED from config.scale
    type.css                 ← AUTO-GENERATED from config.type-base / type-scale-ratio
    colors.css                ← hand-written raw color values
  tokens/
    tokens.css                ← semantic tokens + dark mode. THE override point.
  properties/
    space.css, type.css, colors.css, layout.css, sizing.css, border.css,
    flex.css, grid.css, grid-columns.css (AUTO-GENERATED from config.columns),
    z-index.css, transition.css, state.css, accessibility.css,
    responsive.css (AUTO-GENERATED from config.breakpoints + config.columns)
  composition/
    composition.css           ← .stack, .cluster, .sidebar, .center-xy, .cover
dist/
  bear.css                    ← the one file to <link>, generated by build.js
```

Files marked AUTO-GENERATED are overwritten by `npm run build`. Never hand-edit them.

## Configuration (bear.config.js)

```javascript
module.exports = {
  "scale": [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32], // spacing scale steps
  "base-unit": 4,          // px per scale step
  "type-scale-ratio": 1.25, // ratio between type sizes
  "type-base": 16,          // base font size in px — anchors the whole type scale
  "columns": 12,             // grid column count — drives grid-cols/col-span/col-start/col-end
  "breakpoints": { "s": 480, "m": 768, "l": 1024, "xl": 1280 }
};
```

Maintainer workflow: edit `bear.config.js` → run `npm run build` (or
`node src/build.js`) → regenerates scale.css, type.css, grid-columns.css,
responsive.css → bundles + minifies everything into `dist/bear.css`.

## Class naming convention

`[property]-[value]` for base utilities, e.g. `.p-md`, `.text-lg`, `.bg-accent`.
`[state]\:[utility]` for pseudo-class variants, e.g. `.hover\:bg-accent`,
`.focus-visible\:outline`, `.disabled\:opacity-50`.
`[utility]\@[breakpoint]` for viewport media queries, e.g. `.grid-cols-2\@m`.
`[utility]\@c-[breakpoint]` for container queries, e.g. `.hidden\@c-s`
(requires a `.container-type-inline` ancestor).

## Token reference (the override points)

- Space: `--space-none|xs|sm|md|lg|xl|2xl|3xl` — md and up are fluid (clamp())
- Type size: `--text-size-xs|sm|base|md|lg|xl|2xl|3xl`
- Type: `--font-sans|serif|mono`, `--text-leading-tight|base|loose`,
  `--text-tracking-tight|base|wide`
- Color (semantic, theme-aware): `--color-text|text-subtle|text-strong`,
  `--color-surface|surface-raised|surface-sunken`, `--color-border`,
  `--color-accent|accent-hover`, `--color-danger`, `--color-success`
- Radius (deliberately separate from space — not fluid):
  `--radius-none|xs|sm|md|lg|xl|full`
- Z-index (named layers, not raw numbers): `--z-behind|base|raised|sticky|
  dropdown|overlay|modal|popover|toast|tooltip|max`
- Transition: `--duration-instant|fast|base|slow`, `--ease-linear|in|out|in-out`

## Utility class families (properties layer)

- Margin/Padding: `.m-*` `.mt-*` `.mb-*` `.my-*` `.mx-*` `.ml-*` `.mr-*`,
  `.p-*` `.pt-*` `.pb-*` `.py-*` `.px-*` `.pl-*` `.pr-*` — logical properties,
  scale suffix: none|xs|sm|md|lg|xl|2xl (margin also has `auto`)
- Gap: `.gap-*`, `.gap-x-*`, `.gap-y-*` (scale: none|xs|sm|md|lg|xl, gap-only
  also has 2xl)
- Typography: `.text-{xs..3xl}`, `.font-{sans|serif|mono}`,
  `.font-{normal|medium|semibold|bold}`, `.leading-*`, `.tracking-*`,
  `.text-{left|center|right}`, `.uppercase|lowercase|capitalize`, `.italic`,
  `.underline|no-underline`, `.text-balance` (headings), `.text-pretty`
  (body copy), `.truncate`, `.whitespace-nowrap`, `.break-words`
- Color: `.text-{default|subtle|strong|accent|danger|success|inherit}`,
  `.bg-{surface|raised|sunken|accent|danger|success|transparent}`,
  `.border-{default|accent|danger|success}` (pair with `.border` from
  border.css), `.opacity-{0|25|50|75|100}`
- Layout: `.block|inline|inline-block|flex|inline-flex|grid|inline-grid|
  contents|hidden`, `.static|relative|absolute|fixed|sticky`, `.inset-*`
  (logical), `.visible|invisible`, `.isolate`, `.float-start|end|none`,
  `.object-{contain|cover|fill|none}`, `.overflow-{auto|hidden|clip|visible|
  scroll}` (+ -x/-y variants), `.cursor-*`, `.container-type-inline`
  (creates a container-query context)
- Sizing (logical: inline-size = width, block-size = height): `.w-{auto|
  full|screen|min|max|fit|xs..3xl}`, `.h-{...same...}`, `.min-w-*`,
  `.max-w-{...|prose|narrow|wide|s|m|l|xl}`, `.min-h-*`, `.max-h-*`,
  `.aspect-{auto|square|video|photo|wide}`
- Border: `.border` `.border-0|2|4`, `.border-t|b|l|r` (+ -0/-2 logical
  variants), `.border-{solid|dashed|dotted|none}`, `.rounded-{none|xs|sm|
  md|lg|xl|full}` (+ `.rounded-t-*` / `.rounded-b-*` logical single-side),
  `.outline`, `.outline-none`, `.outline-offset`, `.divide-y` / `.divide-x`
- Flex: `.flex-{row|col|row-rev|col-rev}`, `.flex-{wrap|nowrap|wrap-rev}`,
  `.grow` `.grow-0` `.shrink` `.shrink-0`, `.flex-{1|auto|initial|none}`,
  `.justify-{start|end|center|between|around|evenly|stretch}`,
  `.items-{start|end|center|baseline|stretch}`, `.self-*`, `.content-*`,
  `.order-{first|last|none|1|2|3}`, `.place-{center|start|end|between}`
- Grid: `.grid-cols-{1..12}` (full run, generated from config.columns),
  `.grid-cols-none`, `.grid-auto-fit` / `.grid-auto-fill` (override
  `--grid-min`), `.grid-rows-{1|2|3|none}`, `.grid-flow-*`,
  `.col-span-{1..12}` + `.col-span-full`, `.col-start-{1..12}`,
  `.col-end-{1..13}` + `.col-end-auto` + `.col-end-last`, `.row-span-*`,
  `.row-start-*`, `.place-items-*`, `.place-self-*`, `.subgrid-cols`,
  `.subgrid-rows`
- Z-index: `.z-{behind|base|raised|sticky|dropdown|overlay|modal|popover|
  toast|tooltip|max|auto}` — always use named layers, never a raw number
- Transition: `.transition` `.transition-{none|colors|opacity|shadow|
  transform|all}`, `.duration-{instant|fast|base|slow}`, `.ease-{linear|
  in|out|in-out}` — transitions are opt-in, pair a `.transition-*` class
  with a `.hover\:*` etc. class or nothing will animate
- State (pseudo-class variants — not every utility has every state):
  `.hover\:*` (wrapped in `(hover:hover) and (pointer:fine)`),
  `.focus-visible\:*` (default choice for focus rings),
  `.focus\:*` (fires on any focus incl. mouse click — use sparingly),
  `.active\:*`, `.disabled\:*` (covers both `:disabled` and
  `[aria-disabled="true"]`)
- Accessibility: `.sr-only` (visually hidden, screen-reader visible),
  `.sr-only-focusable` (hidden until keyboard focus — for skip links)

## Compositions (layout patterns)

- `.stack` — vertical flex, `gap: var(--space-md)`. Modifiers must be
  scoped: `<div class="stack stack-sm">`, not `.stack-sm` alone.
- `.cluster` — horizontal flex, wraps, `align-items: center`
- `.sidebar` — classic 2-column holy grail; first child `flex-basis: 20rem`,
  second child grows to fill
- `.center-xy` — `display:grid; place-items:center`
- `.cover` — fills `100dvh`, centers its child via `margin-block: auto`

## Responsive + container queries

Both are generated per breakpoint (s/m/l/xl from config) as `@media
(min-width: …)` and `@container (min-width: …)` blocks. Container query
classes need a `.container-type-inline` ancestor to have any effect.
Coverage per breakpoint: display, flex-direction, alignment, justify, gap,
full `grid-cols-1..12` / `col-span-1..12` / `col-start-1..12`, and text size.

## Dark mode

Three-layer cascade in `tokens.css`, in this exact order (source order
matters — do not reorder):
1. `:root` — light values, the default
2. `@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { :root:not([data-theme="light"]) }`
   — OS preference, skipped if user explicitly chose light
3. `:root[data-theme="dark"]` / `:root[data-theme="light"]` — explicit
   manual override, always wins via source order

Toggle in JS: `document.documentElement.dataset.theme = 'dark' | 'light'`.
Reset to OS preference: `delete document.documentElement.dataset.theme`.

## Rules an agent should follow when generating markup or extending the framework

- Never write a raw hex color, px/rem spacing value, or magic z-index number
  directly in HTML style attributes or new CSS — use an existing utility
  class, or add a token if one doesn't exist yet.
- Prefer composition classes (`.stack`, `.cluster`) over manually chaining
  flex utilities for common layout patterns.
- Pair `.hover\:*` / state utilities with an explicit `.transition-*` class
  if you want the state change to animate — they are not bundled together.
- Use logical property utilities (`.ms-*`, `.inset-inline-*`, `.w-*` via
  `inline-size`) rather than assuming LTR-only physical direction.
- Never hand-edit files marked AUTO-GENERATED — change `bear.config.js` and
  run `npm run build` instead.
- `src/` is never shipped to a browser — only `dist/bear.css` is linked in
  production HTML.

## Links

- Repo: https://github.com/iggydotdev/bear.css
- README: README.md
- Config: bear.config.js
- Token source of truth: src/tokens/tokens.css
- License: MIT
